results.title: Indiana purchases pricey hospitality suite for historic D.C. race
results.description: When IndyCar drivers take the green flag for a first-ever road course race around the National Mall in Washington, D.C., Indiana economic development officials will be entertaining guests in a $200,000 hospitality suite.
